evals.prompt: I have 500 contacts for a campaign but only 60% have emails. Enrich the rest.
evals.expected_output: Pre-enrichment checklist (dedup first), batch enrichment approach, credit estimation, and email verification recommendation

assertions.name: dedup_first
assertions.description: Recommends deduplicating the list before enriching

assertions.name: batch_approach
assertions.description: Recommends batch enrichment for the 200 contacts missing emails

assertions.name: credit_estimate
assertions.description: Estimates the credit cost for the enrichment

assertions.name: verification
assertions.description: Recommends email verification before launching the campaign

evals.prompt: Our Salesforce has 50,000 contacts but half the data is stale. Help me clean it up.
evals.expected_output: Phased CRM hygiene plan with prioritization, dedup strategy, enrichment schedule, and credit budgeting

assertions.name: phased_approach
assertions.description: Recommends a phased approach rather than enriching all 50k at once

assertions.name: stale_data_checks
assertions.description: Identifies how to find stale records (bounced emails, outdated titles, missing fields)

assertions.name: credit_budget
assertions.description: Calculates or discusses credit budget for the cleanup
